_comment: The kid-facing allow-list for tools/export_player_data.py. Canon (rpg_kids) says WHAT exists. This file says what ships to the tablets and how it reads for a 5 and a 7 year old. Keys must match canon names exactly (trailing parentheticals stripped). Anything in canon with no entry here fails the export on purpose. That is the secrets filter.

party.name: The Lima Sisters
party.goldUnknownNote: We will count our gold at the next game!

The Ancient Field Log.text: An old explorer's notebook full of clues.

The Wayfinder Prism.text: A crystal that turns light into rainbows.

Pouch of Star-Seeds.text: Tiny seeds that glow like stars. 3 uses left.

Mom's letter.name: Mom's Letter
Mom's letter.text: Sealed with purple wax. It is from Mom!

Torn letter from Odbert's box.name: The Torn Letter
Torn letter from Odbert's box.text: From Odbert's box. Part of it is missing.

Iridescent shield-boss stone.name: The Shield-Boss Stone
Iridescent shield-boss stone.text: A shimmering stone. It fits the picture on the cavern wall.

heroes.tagline: An elf healer. Her staff glows with rainbow light.

Searing Light.text: Shoot a beam of light at a monster up to 4 squares away.

Healing Touch.text: Remove 1 damage from yourself or a friend next to you.

Potion Brewer.text: After a battle, refill 1 potion that you or a friend used.

Crescent Moon Shield.text: You and friends next to you get 1 extra armor die for 2 turns.
Crescent Moon Shield.limit: After you cast it, the moon must rest for 3 turns.

Ring of Sisters Lima.text: Worn on her hand. It glows when the sisters are together.

heroes.tagline: Strong and brave. She hits hard and protects her sisters.

Cloud-Cutter Strike.text: Swing your blade at a monster right next to you.

Knockback Attack.text: Attack with 1 less die. If you hit, push the monster back 4 squares.

Retaliation.text: If a monster hurt you and you hit it back, deal 2 damage.

Meteor Strike.text: Leap high and smash the ground. Monsters within 2 squares must dodge or take 1 damage.
Meteor Strike.limit: You cannot use it two turns in a row.

Ring of Sisters Lima.text: Worn on her hand. It glows when the sisters are together.

heroes.tagline: A knight with a magical shield. She is joining the adventure soon!

Celestial Strike.text: Strike a monster right next to you.

Radiant Shield Bash.text: The next monster beside you attacks with 1 less die. Then hit it with 1 die.

Defender.text: When a friend next to you is hit, you can take the damage instead.

excludedHeroes.Fire in Disguise: Guest hero played by Mom. Not one of the sisters. Stays out of the app.

Find mother.name: Seek the Forgotten Strongholds
Find mother.text: Mom said do not follow her. Find the old strongholds of our people instead.

The Moon-Stone.reason: Module Resolution has not been played at the table yet.

The Sealed Path.name: The Sealed Path
The Sealed Path.text: Silas's old map shows a high mountain pass marked with our crest. The elders say to stay away. Why?

First bell repairs.name: First Bell Repairs
First bell repairs.text: The sheriff needs our help fixing the town when the first bell rings.

Bree.name: Keep Bree Safe
Bree.text: Bree is hiding at Moira's. She owes us a favor.

pets.text: Some new friends are waiting to meet you at the next game!
